  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
  2. AbstractToolCall

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractToolCall

Packages that use AbstractToolCall
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides the core message and part domain primitives for the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the provider-agnostic LLM connectivity and generation interfaces.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AbstractToolCall<?,?>>
    AbstractModelMessage.getToolCalls()
    Filters and returns only the tool call parts from this message.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract int
    AbstractModel.countTokens(AbstractToolCall<?,?> toolCall)
    Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool call in the context window.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    ToolManager.executingCalls
    A thread-safe list of currently executing tool calls.

    Method
    Description
    AbstractToolCall
    ToolManager.createToolCall(AbstractModelMessage amm, String id, String name, Map<String,Object> jsonArgs)
    The primary factory method for creating a model-agnostic tool call from provider-specific data.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AbstractToolCall<?,?>>
    ToolManager.getExecutingCalls()
    Gets an unmodifiable view of the currently executing tool calls.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool with parameters of type AbstractToolCall
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ToolManager.registerExecutingCall(AbstractToolCall<?,?> call)
    Registers a tool call as currently executing and fires a property change event.
    void
    ToolManager.unregisterExecutingCall(AbstractToolCall<?,?> call)
    Unregisters a tool call from the executing list and fires a property change event.

  • Uses of AbstractToolCall in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi with type parameters of type AbstractToolCall
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractTool<P extends AbstractToolParameter, C extends AbstractToolCall>
    The abstract base class for a tool, now generic on its Parameter and Call types.
    class 
    AbstractToolResponse<C extends AbstractToolCall<?,?>>
    Represents the response of a tool call, designed for deferred execution.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    AbstractToolResponse.call
    The originating tool call.

    Description

    Represents a call to a BadTool, capturing an invalid tool request from the model.

    A model-agnostic representation of a request to execute a specific Java method tool.
